description: Echoe 多用户重构（上线前一次性迁移版）- 将单用户全局共享模型升级为按 uid 强隔离的逻辑多租户模型。

userStories.title: Finalize schema for foundational Echoe tables
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want foundational Echoe tables to include uid isolation constraints so tenant boundaries are enforced at the data model level.
acceptanceCriteria: Add uid NOT NULL to echoe_col, echoe_config, echoe_deck_config, echoe_decks, echoe_notetypes, and echoe_templates
Set echoe_config key uniqueness to user scope via PRIMARY KEY (uid, key) or equivalent UNIQUE(uid, key)
Add UNIQUE(uid) to echoe_col
Add UNIQUE(uid, name) to echoe_decks and echoe_notetypes
Add UNIQUE(uid, ntid, ord) to echoe_templates
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Finalize schema for note, card, media, and log tables
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want content and log tables to enforce uid-scoped uniqueness and indexes so all high-traffic Echoe data is isolated and queryable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add uid NOT NULL to echoe_notes, echoe_cards, echoe_media, echoe_graves, and echoe_revlog
Make echoe_revlog.uid non-null in final schema
Add UNIQUE(uid, guid) to echoe_notes
Add UNIQUE(uid, filename) to echoe_media
Create first-wave indexes for echoe_notes (uid, mid), (uid, sfld), (uid, mod)
Create first-wave indexes for echoe_cards (uid, nid), (uid, did, queue, due), (uid, last_review)
Create first-wave indexes for echoe_revlog (uid, cid), (uid, id), echoe_graves (uid, oid, type), and echoe_deck_config (uid, name)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Generate and validate one-shot migration
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want one destructive Drizzle migration for final-state schema so rollout is deterministic and avoids manual database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate migration with pnpm --filter @echoe/server migrate:generate from final schema
Migration SQL contains final-state structure only with no compatibility columns or uid IS NULL fallback logic
Migration runs successfully with pnpm --filter @echoe/server migrate on a cleaned Echoe dataset
Post-migration schema matches declared table constraints and indexes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Apply uid context to core Echoe controllers
userStories.description: As an API developer, I want core Echoe controllers to require authenticated uid context so requests always execute in the current user namespace.
acceptanceCriteria: Update echoe-config.controller.ts, echoe-deck.controller.ts, echoe-note.controller.ts, and echoe-study.controller.ts to inject @CurrentUser() userDto
Return unauthorized response when userDto.uid is missing
Pass uid explicitly from controller methods to service calls
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Apply uid context to edge Echoe controllers
userStories.description: As an API developer, I want edge Echoe controllers to enforce uid context so non-core workflows cannot leak data across users.
acceptanceCriteria: Update echoe-stats.controller.ts, echoe-tag.controller.ts, echoe-media.controller.ts, echoe-import.controller.ts, echoe-export.controller.ts, echoe-csv-import.controller.ts, and echoe-duplicate.controller.ts to inject @CurrentUser() userDto
Return unauthorized response when userDto.uid is missing
Pass uid explicitly from controller methods to service calls
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor foundational services for uid filtering
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want foundational Echoe services to write and query by uid so base metadata is tenant-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor echoe-config.service.ts and echoe-deck.service.ts signatures to include uid: string
Ensure insert operations write uid explicitly
Ensure select, update, and delete operations include uid predicates
Ensure joins in these services enforce same-uid associations
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor study-domain services for uid filtering
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want note and study domain services to enforce uid boundaries so learning data cannot be cross-accessed.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor echoe-note.service.ts, echoe-study.service.ts, echoe-stats.service.ts, echoe-tag.service.ts, and echoe-duplicate.service.ts signatures to include uid: string
Ensure insert operations write uid explicitly
Ensure select, update, and delete operations include uid predicates
Ensure joins in these services enforce same-uid associations
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor import and export services for user namespace
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want import/export pipelines to operate in uid namespace so package and CSV operations remain tenant-isolated.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor echoe-import.service.ts, echoe-export.service.ts, and echoe-csv-import.service.ts signatures to include uid: string
Ensure all imported records are written with current uid
Apply duplicate checks in user scope such as (uid, guid)
Ensure export only reads current uid data
Update CSV import flow to use noteService.createNote(uid, dto)
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement media storage and metadata uid isolation
userStories.description: As a user, I want media files and metadata namespaced by uid so same filenames can coexist without cross-user access.
acceptanceCriteria: Change object storage key format from echoe-media/<filename> to echoe-media/<uid>/<filename>
Ensure echoe-media DB reads, updates, and deletes are filtered by uid
Keep upload and retrieval behavior consistent for same-user access
Reject or hide cross-user media access attempts
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace global seed with ensureUserWorkspace
userStories.description: As a new user, I want my own default Echoe workspace initialized automatically so I can use Echoe without relying on global seed data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ensureUserWorkspace(uid) with idempotent behavior
Initialize user-scoped defaults for col, deck, deck_config, notetype, and template
Trigger initialization on registration success or first Echoe entry
Remove reliance on global fixed resources such as id=1 defaults
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Centralize Echoe ID generation in id.ts
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want Echoe domain IDs generated from a single utility so ID semantics are consistent and Date.now() usage is removed from business logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or extend generators in apps/server/src/utils/id.ts for deck, notetype, template, note, card, and revlog
Replace scattered Date.now() ID generation in Echoe business code with centralized helpers
Ensure all updated call sites compile with explicit ID source
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add unit tests for uid-filtered service behavior
userStories.description: As a QA-focused developer, I want unit coverage proving service queries include uid filters so accidental omissions are caught early.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update unit tests to assert uid predicates in key service query paths
Cover insert paths to assert uid is written
Cover update/delete paths to assert uid-scoped mutations
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add dual-user integration tests for core workflows
userStories.description: As a QA-focused developer, I want A/B user integration tests for core Echoe flows so cross-user visibility and mutation regressions are blocked.
acceptanceCriteria: Add integration tests covering note, card, deck, study, stats, and tag workflows with two users
Assert user B cannot read, update, or delete user A resources
Assert cross-user lookups return unauthorized or empty results per endpoint contract
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add integration and security tests for edge workflows
userStories.description: As a QA-focused developer, I want edge-path isolation tests so import/export/media workflows are release-gated against tenant boundary leaks.
acceptanceCriteria: Add integration tests for import, export, and media flows using two users
Verify exports only contain current uid data
Verify same filename uploads across users do not conflict
Add malicious cross-user ID access tests for protected Echoe APIs
Mark dual-user isolation suite as release gate
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
